name: Favorite Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugars and butter together until smooth.
2. Add the melted chocolate to the mixture and beat well.
3. Beat the yolks, then add water and vanilla, blending thoroughly.
4. Gradually mix the yolk mixture into the chocolate mixture, beating until light and fluffy.
5. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
6. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and milk to the batter, mixing well after each addition.
7. Beat the egg whites until stiff but not dry, then fold them into the batter.
8. Pour the batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round pans, or one greased and floured 13x9-inch pan.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 30-35 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on a cooling rack.
